upgrade.title: Prioritize and manage work with Customers.
upgrade.description: Map your work to customers and prioritize by customer attributes.

customer_name.name: Customer name
customer_name.placeholder: This could be name of the person or business

validation.max_length: Customer name cannot be more than 255 characters.

website_url.name: Website
website_url.placeholder: Any URL with https:// will work.

employees.name: Employees
employees.placeholder: Number of employees if your customer is a business.

revenue.name: Revenue
revenue.placeholder: This is the revenue your customer generates annually.

custom.title: Custom properties
custom.info: Add your customers' unique attributes to Plane so you can manage work items or customer records better.

empty_state.title: You don't have any custom properties yet.
empty_state.description: Custom properties that you'd like to see in work items, elsewhere in Plane,or outside Plane in a CRM or another tool, will show up here when you add them.

detail.title: We couldn't find that customer record.
detail.description: The link to this record could be wrong or this record could have been deleted.

search.title: You don't seem to have customer records matching that term.
search.description: Try with another search term or reach out to us if you are sure you should see results for that term.

list.title: Manage your work's volume, cadence, and flow by what's important to your customers.
list.description: With Customers, a Plane-only feature, you can now create new customers from scratch and connect them to your work. Soon,  you will bring them over from other tools along with their custom attributes that matter to you.

settings.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this page.
settings.description: Track and manage customer relationships in your workflow.

success.title: You've turned on Customers for this workspace.
success.message: Members can now add customer records, link them to work items, and more.

error.title: We couldn't turn on Customers this time.
error.message: Try again or come back to this screen later. If it still doesn't work.

error.title: We couldn't get your list of customers.
error.message: Try again or refresh this page.

copy_link.title: You copied the direct link to this customer.
copy_link.message: Paste in anywhere and it will lead right back here.

success.title: {customer_name} is now available
success.message: You can reference this customer in work items and track requests from them, too.

error.title: We couldn't create that record this time.
error.message: Try saving it again or copy over your unsaved text to a new entry, preferably in another tab.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Unable to update customer. Try again!

error.title: We couldn't upload the customer's logo.
error.message: Try saving the logo again or start from scratch.

success.title: You have removed a work item from this customer's record.
success.message: We have automatically removed this customer from the work item, too.

error.title: Error!
error.message: We couldn't remove that work item from this customer's record this time.

error.title: We couldn't add that work item to this customer's record this time.
error.message: Try adding that work item again or come back to it later. If it still doesn't work, reach out to us.

success.title: You have added a work item to this customer's record.
success.message: We have automatically added this customer to the work item, too.

delete.title: Are you sure you want to delete the customer record {customer_name}?
delete.description: All data associated with this record will be deleted permanently. You can't restore this record later.

list.title: There're no requests to show yet.
list.description: Create requests from your customers so you can link them to work items.

search.title: You don't seem to have requests matching that term.
search.description: Try with another search term or reach out to us if you are sure you should see results for that term.

validation.max_length: Request name name should not exceed 255 characters.

description.placeholder: Describe the nature of the request or paste this customer's comment from another tool.

copy_link.title: Link copied
copy_link.message: Customer request link copied to clipboard.

success.title: Attachment uploaded
success.message: The attachment has been successfully uploaded.

error.title: Attachment not uploaded
error.message: The attachment could not be uploaded.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Only one file can be uploaded at a time.

length.message: File must be of {size}MB or less in size

success.title: Attachment removed
success.message: The attachment has been successfully removed

error.title: Attachment not removed
error.message: The Attachment could not be removed

error.title: Error!
error.message: Unable to add work items to the request. Try again.

success.title: Success!
success.message: Added work items to the request.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Unable to update request. Try again!

error.title: Error!
error.message: Unable to create request. Try again!

list.title: You don't seem to have linked work items to this customer yet.
list.description: Link existing work items from any project here so you can track them by this customer.
